metadata.dc:title: Longitudinal dataset (2000-2025) on digital technology adoption indicators across 21 Latin American and Iberian countries. Variables: internet penetration, mobile subscriptions, smartphone adoption, social media usage, e-commerce, digital payments, A
metadata.dc:creator: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
metadata.dc:description: Longitudinal dataset (2000-2025) on digital technology adoption indicators across 21 Latin American and Iberian countries. Variables: internet penetration, mobile subscriptions, smartphone adoption, social media usage, e-commerce, digital payments, A
